# Template Documentation

This directory documents the current template lifecycle shipped in ReelForge.

## Available guides

- [Template system technical notes](./template-system.md) — implementation-oriented reference for developers and advanced users
- [Template user guide](./template-user-guide.md) — task-oriented walkthrough for saving, browsing, using, and managing templates

## Scope

These docs reflect the current implementation in:

- the editor save flow
- the public template library
- template detail and placeholder entry
- account-side template management
- starter categories currently surfaced in the UI

They intentionally describe current behavior only. Features such as delete, duplicate, private sharing, and paid template checkout are not documented as supported because they are not fully exposed in the current UI flow.
